decision: Widen the dynamic surface and skills; turn the admission cap into an elastic queue rather than raising it
rationale: User chose "widen surface+skills, cap as elastic queue": keep the 4GB/agent RAM ceiling exact, overflow queues instead of denying, widen what the model can express (loops/branches/recursion) and which skills it loads

decision: Full push: durability + observability included (all units 0-6)
rationale: User chose "full push incl. durability + observability" over a narrower slice

decision: Integrator hand-writes critical-path units; the fleet dogfoods the rest
rationale: User chose "I do critical-path units, fleet dogfoods the rest"; critical-path files (dispatcher/runner/admission/program-runtime/cli/hooks/phases/CI/pyproject/uv.lock) are integrator-only

decision: Ran the arena as 3 isolated candidates across three contested axes (where dynamic control lives / elastic-bound shape / event-log role)
rationale: Architect Phase B prescribes whole-shape diversity; CLAUDE.md + task arg forbid Opus subagents, so diversity came from forced-distinct biases on sonnet runners judged by the Opus main thread (documented deviation)

decision: Synthesis: base C1 (minimal seam); graft C3 closed-branch-keys + typed sealed events; graft C2 pure fold + journaled-verdict replay
rationale: C1 has the smallest blast radius and clean unit decomposition; C3's closed-key branch kills the unguarded-verdict failure mode; C2's fold + verdict-replay makes resume exact

decision: Reject C2 asyncio CentralScheduler and C3 SQLite store + first-class GraphSpec
rationale: asyncio is too much blast radius for a sync codebase; SQLite is a new NFS-unsafe dependency; the full graph is more than the predicate needs. Graph retained as the explicit Phase-E scrap-and-regrow fallback

decision: Foundational insight: the reserved=1 arithmetic does not move to one place, it stops existing
rationale: Because CapacityGate wraps the same AdmissionController the parent was admitted through, the parent's 4GB is already counted in in_flight_ram_gb; the shared RAM accounting already reserves the parent's slot

decision: Built committed verification harness measuring all four predicate dimensions; captured the pre-change baseline
rationale: figure-it-out: build the harness before the work so each later unit reads as a measured old-vs-new delta; reuse the proven real-FleetDispatcher load test (zero composer cost)

decision: Baseline: D1 width=5 (replan/branch/subprogram absent); D2 reserved=1 sites=3, CapacityGate absent, bounded load 0 denials vs negative-control 6 denials; D3 resume absent; D4 journal-query absent
rationale: The negative control reproducing 6 denials proves the harness can see the thing it measures; gates clean (ruff pass, ty 52 = baseline, 575 passed/4 skipped)
